heading: Omitted
label: 1191 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for per capita distribution of certain judgment funds to eligible members of the Confederated Tribes and set out provisions relating to the payment of shares of deceased members and minors or incompetents, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–259, § 184 Stat. 253May 21, 1970
